name: Gwihyang : Homecoming
short_description: "Gwihyang" captures the traditional image of Korea, giving it a new experience. A tense adventure unfolds in which you escape the threat of monsters in the changing space and use items to escape. Hope you can enjoy fear and fun at the same time through this "Gwihyang" with Korean sentiment.
detailed_description:
New fear in tradition, Gwihyang : Homecoming


"Gwihyang : Homecoming" is a horror game created based on traditional Korean settings.
In an ever-changing space, you must evade the threats of monsters while using various items to escape, providing a thrilling experience full of tension.
Test your courage through "Gwihyang : Homecoming" where Korean sensibilities and modern gameplay are exquisitely blended.

◈ Randomly generated map


⇒ The map structure changes each time you play Gwihyang : Homecoming.
Only moving forward according to the given situation will keep you safe from monsters.

◈ Unique monsters


⇒ Various monsters based on monsters from Korean folklore monitor and track the player's every move.
The key to playing is to quickly understand the characteristics of the monsters.

◈ Various items


⇒ There are many items left here for some reason.
Using the items left behind may help you escape or escape a threatening situation.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese
